symptoms: Primary DB CPU jumped from 18% to 99% within 12 minutes of deploy
Slow query log: 80 000 individual SELECT on products table per minute
Read replica replication lag: 52 seconds behind primary
DB connection pool at 97% — downstream services starting to queue
hypotheses_tested: N+1 query regression in order history
failed_attempts: Reverting the deploy as a temporary fix
confirmed_root_cause: ProductService.get_by_id() is called once per order item in a Python for-loop, issuing one SELECT per call, causing an N+1 query regression
resolution_action: Hotfix: replaced loop with single SELECT ... WHERE id IN (all_item_ids) batch query, deployed behind feature flag
